loop1.title: Power & Energy (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power/energy snapshots and trends; projected demand is a load-factor derivation, not a direct meter reading.

loop1.title: Voltage Monitor (Real-Time)
loop1.note: Showing live three-phase voltage trends (R-N, Y-N, B-N) and KPIs; statutory voltage thresholds are omitted as the asset's nameplate rating is unknown.
